# Pull Request

## 📌 Summary
Briefly explain what this PR changes and why.

## 🔗 Related Issue
Closes #[issue-number]

## 🔎 Type
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Breaking change
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Refactor

## ✔️ Quick Checks
- [ ] Follows project standards
- [ ] No hardcoded strings or colors
- [ ] Tested locally (`npm run lint && npm run build`)
- [ ] Tests added if needed

## 🖼️ Screenshots
Required for UI changes.

## 📚 Context
https://github.com/ColombiaBlockChain/Enigma/tree/main/docs
